mapper.select: SELECT model_version FROM model_registry WHERE status IN ('ready', 'online') ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, external_user_no, password_hash, gender, birth_year, register_time, user_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE user_status = 1 ORDER BY user_id
SELECT user_id, external_user_no, password_hash, gender, birth_year, register_time, user_status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE user_status = 1 AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT item_id, external_item_no, title, artist_id, artist_name, album_id, album_name, genre_code, language_code, duration_seconds, release_date, item_status, created_at, updated_at FROM items WHERE item_status = 1 AND title NOT LIKE '绀轰緥姝屾洸%' ORDER BY item_id

SELECT feature_date, user_id, item_id, last_interaction_time, interaction_cnt_30d, complete_play_cnt_30d, favorite_flag_ever, dislike_flag_30d FROM user_item_features_daily WHERE feature_date = (SELECT MAX(feature_date) FROM user_item_features_daily) ORDER BY user_id, item_id

SELECT feature_date, user_id, item_id, last_interaction_time, interaction_cnt_30d, complete_play_cnt_30d, favorite_flag_ever, dislike_flag_30d FROM user_item_features_daily WHERE feature_date = (SELECT MAX(feature_date) FROM user_item_features_daily) AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY item_id
SELECT user_id, item_id, MAX(rating_value) AS rating_value, MAX(rating_time) AS rating_time FROM explicit_ratings GROUP BY user_id, item_id ORDER BY user_id, item_id
SELECT user_id, item_id, MAX(rating_value) AS rating_value, MAX(rating_time) AS rating_time FROM explicit_ratings WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id, item_id ORDER BY item_id
SELECT user_id, item_id FROM user_favorite_items ORDER BY user_id, item_id
SELECT user_id, item_id FROM user_favorite_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY item_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_type IN ('play_start', 'play_complete')

SELECT i.item_id, i.title, i.artist_name, i.genre_code, COALESCE(f.popularity_score, 0) AS score, 0 AS rank_no, '' AS reason_text, NOW() AS request_time FROM items i LEFT JOIN item_features_daily f ON f.item_id = i.item_id AND f.feature_date = (SELECT MAX(feature_date) FROM item_features_daily) WHERE i.item_status = 1 AND i.title NOT LIKE 'ç¼â‚¬æžæ‰®ä¼æ¿®æ¿†æœ¬å¨²?' ORDER BY COALESCE(f.popularity_score, 0) DESC, COALESCE(f.favorite_cnt_30d, 0) DESC, COALESCE(f.play_complete_cnt_1d, 0) DESC, COALESCE(f.click_cnt_1d, 0) DESC, COALESCE(f.exposure_cnt_1d, 0) DESC, i.item_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_registry ( model_version, model_name, algorithm, feature_version, sampling_version, train_snapshot_date, train_start_time, train_end_time, metrics_json, model_uri, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{modelVersion}, #{modelName}, #{algorithm}, #{featureVersion}, #{samplingVersion}, #{trainSnapshotDate}, NOW(), NOW(), #{metricsJson}, #{modelUri}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE model_name = VALUES(model_name), algorithm = VALUES(algorithm), feature_version = VALUES(feature_version), sampling_version = VALUES(sampling_version), train_snapshot_date = VALUES(train_snapshot_date), train_end_time = NOW(), metrics_json = VALUES(metrics_json), model_uri = VALUES(model_uri), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO user_embeddings (model_version, user_id, embedding_dim, embedding_vector, updated_at) VALUES
(#{record.modelVersion}, #{record.userId}, #{record.embeddingDim}, #{record.embeddingVector}, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE embedding_dim = VALUES(embedding_dim), embedding_vector = VALUES(embedding_vector), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO item_embeddings (model_version, item_id, embedding_dim, embedding_vector, updated_at) VALUES
(#{record.modelVersion}, #{record.itemId}, #{record.embeddingDim}, #{record.embeddingVector}, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE embedding_dim = VALUES(embedding_dim), embedding_vector = VALUES(embedding_vector), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO rec_results ( request_id, user_id, item_id, model_version, score, rank_no, reason_text, scene, request_time ) VALUES
( #{record.requestId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.itemId}, #{record.modelVersion}, #{record.score}, #{record.rankNo}, #{record.reasonText}, #{record.scene}, #{record.requestTime} )
